Discord vs Ferni Face Analysis

Discord (Original - Green)

Eye dimensions: 4.32w × 4.8h

Eye ratio: 1.11 (taller than wide)

Eye positions: 33% and 67% of width

Eye vertical: Centered at 54% down

Current Ferni

Eye dimensions: 3.4 × 3.4 (perfect circles)

Eye ratio: 1.0

Smile: Bezier curve (arbitrary)

Improved Versions

V1: Golden Ratio Smile

Smile width = 61.8% of face

Arc-based (circular segment)

V2: Elliptical Arc

Gentler curve

Ellipse-based (wider, gentler)

V3: Filled Crescent (Precise)

Two concentric arcs

Mathematical crescent

V4: Apple-style

Minimal, balanced

Clean arc, balanced proportions

Mathematical Analysis

Discord Eye Proportions:

  • Width: 4.32 units (18% of 24-unit viewBox)
  • Height: 4.8 units (20% of viewBox)
  • Aspect ratio: 1.11 (height/width) — slightly oval
  • Left eye center: x=8.013 (33.4% from left)
  • Right eye center: x=15.987 (66.6% from left)
  • Vertical center: y=13 (54% from top)

Golden Ratio Application:

  • φ (phi): 1.618
  • Smile width: 61.8% of circle diameter
  • Eye spacing: 33.3% (rule of thirds, close to 1/φ = 0.618)
  • Vertical division: Eyes at 40%, smile at 60% (close to φ ratio)
